# Markdown Browser

> A browser for the machine-readable web. Browse any website as clean markdown, navigate llms.txt sitemaps, and see the internet through the eyes of AI agents.

Markdown Browser leverages the llms.txt standard to navigate websites. If no llms.txt is available, it uses extraction strategies to convert any webpage to markdown. Features include a sidebar for llms.txt navigation, markdown form links for interactivity, search and extract engines, and token/metadata inspection for debugging agent workflows.

## Main

- [Markdown Browser](https://markdownbrowser.com/): Home page — try the browser, search the markdown web, and explore agent-friendly sites
- [Blog: Introducing Markdown Browser](https://markdownbrowser.com/BLOG.md): Why the markdown web needs a browser, core features, and the vision for an agent-friendly internet
